Disclaimer: Call 911 in case of emergency; 988 for suicide prevention lifeline; This is my first-person account of my own journey; This is not advice. Full acceptable use policy.

Things I Avoid

Places, products, and situations I stay away from to protect my sobriety.

← Back to Recovery Life Skills
This is my own personal list — not a general recommendation. Every person in recovery has different triggers and history. These are the specific things I have learned I must avoid.
  • Hand sanitizer
  • Passing by my typical liquor stores
  • Going to old bars
